changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.sql: -- Password: admin123 (bcrypt hash) -- Generated using BCrypt with cost factor 10 INSERT INTO users (id, email, password, status, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), 'admin@librelog.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdL17lhWy', 'ACTIVE', 'ADMIN', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (email) DO NOTHING;
